tasks.subject: Extract the existing generate() orchestration from components/LetterGeneratorWorkspaceV2.tsx into services/document-generation-service.ts. Preserve current behavior exactly. Keep LetterGeneratorWorkspaceV2 responsible for UI state, status messages, panel switching, and saveCase calls. Move route iteration, template reading, letter rendering, affidavit generation, FTC conditional generation, warning collection, route coverage validation, and ordered ZIP assembly into the service. Do not change packet order. Do not change output paths. Do not change the active workflow contract.
